classes.core_shared: Cross-project runtime or governance tool with stable contract.
classes.domain_shared: Reusable domain tool or helper with bounded business logic.
classes.maintenance: Migration, audit, compatibility, or maintenance-only tool.
classes.temporary_candidate: Likely narrow, report-specific, or under-governed tool that should not be treated as a stable shared primitive.

statuses.active: Expected to be available and reusable.
statuses.maintenance_only: Kept for governance, migration, or support tasks.
statuses.compat: Kept for compatibility or transition; do not expand scope.
statuses.candidate_review: Exists, but should be reviewed for demotion, relocation, or retirement.

path_policies.notes: Office unpack/pack/validation helpers for reusable document pipelines.
Word-specific helpers; reusable but not part of the cross-project KB/runtime core.
PPTX structure helpers used by PPT authoring/edit flows.
Search helpers exist, but runtime integration is still weak and should be reviewed.

PDF form/annotation helpers form a coherent sub-toolchain, but they are not part of the current active runtime surface and should be treated as maintenance-only until reactivated by a governed PDF-form workflow.
Reporter scripts are high-risk for single-use drift unless explicitly promoted.

shared/tools/conda-python.sh.notes: Canonical Bash launcher for repo Python execution.

shared/tools/conda-python.ps1.notes: PowerShell launcher fallback for Windows users.

shared/tools/backlog.py.notes: Structured backlog runtime for project_management projects.

shared/tools/bom_parser.py.notes: Tier-1 BOM parsing primitive with reusable extraction logic.

shared/tools/check_sot_ld.py.notes: Governance checker for layered dependency discipline.

shared/tools/db_schema.py.notes: Canonical schema cache generator and reader.

shared/tools/decision_meta_backfill.py.notes: One-off backfill utility; not a normal runtime primitive.

shared/tools/embedding_utils.py.notes: Shared embedding helper for KB/vector workflows.

shared/tools/graph_query.py.notes: Knowledge-graph query helper used beyond a single report.

shared/tools/indexing_reminder.py.notes: Tracks capability-related KB writebacks that should trigger semantic relation reminders.

shared/tools/kb.py.notes: Primary KB CLI and source-of-truth interface.

shared/tools/kb_index.py.notes: Legacy KB entry point retained for compatibility.

shared/tools/kb_writer.py.notes: Legacy wrapper; should not be expanded.

shared/tools/ltx_csv_parser.py.notes: Reusable parser for LTX tester CSVs.

shared/tools/marp_build.py.notes: Reusable Marp build wrapper for PPTX/PDF generation.

shared/tools/mes_report.py.notes: MES report download utility with reusable operational logic.

shared/tools/migrate_to_vec0.py.notes: Migration script; not part of day-to-day runtime.

shared/tools/pdf_to_markdown.py.notes: General PDF to Markdown conversion helper.

shared/tools/pptx_panjit.py.notes: Company-brand PPT generation library with durable business logic.

shared/tools/pretool_guard.py.notes: Hard guard on dangerous or contract-breaking command use.

shared/tools/process_kb_query.py.notes: Process-analysis KB query helper with reusable cross-table logic.

shared/tools/scheduled_check.py.notes: Scheduled health-check helper, not a business runtime primitive.

shared/tools/semantic_relation_extractor.notes: Remote api-gpt oss runner for semantic capability relation suggestions.

shared/tools/semantic_relation_review.py.notes: Review and apply semantic relation suggestions before writing them into capability_registry.json.

shared/tools/skill_usage_tracker.py.notes: Tracks SKILL reads into KB metadata.

shared/tools/sync_agent_rules.py.notes: Synchronizes skill rules into agent surfaces.

shared/tools/tool_audit.py.notes: Tool governance audit over shared/tools and tool_manifest.json.

shared/tools/agent_coverage.py.notes: Coverage reporting for sub-agent activation and memory scaffolding.

shared/tools/capability_registry.py.notes: SQLite query surface and sync utility for shared/registry/capability_registry.json.
